{{Quote|Tis bein' too crowded 'round here. Mesa no wantin' to be wit all da stinkowiff outlaunders.|Odoof Grunda|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Odoof Grunda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Artist/Legends|artist]] who lived on the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. He was talented, but also eccentric and didn't like the [[City/Legends|city]] life. One of his [[Painting/Legends|paintings]] showed legendary sculptor [[Sidoras Bey]] crafting a statue of [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]].

Sometime after [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Jaleela Bindoo]] asked a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to meet Grunda and bring his painting of Sidoras Bey back to [[Narmle (city)|Narmle]] for the annual [[Narmle Arts Gala]], where the image was shown during the opening ceremony.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' Jaleela Bindoo sends the player into the wilderness near Narmle to meet Grunda. Talking to the Gungan non-player character places a painting in the player's inventory which will be removed again when the player talks to Bindoo to complete the quest. Using a trick, the player can put the painting into a backpack or his house, restart the mission and keep the painting for himself. The painting is only a copy of another painting which is called ''Painting of a Ronka Plant''.
